properties.descricao: Chen Youlin's family says he has been wrongfully detained for nearly two years on spying charges.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba slowly gets power back after third blackout in 10 days
properties.descricao: Cuba suffered another blackout of the National Electric System, or SEN, on Tuesday, leaving the entire country without power, officials said. It was the third such incident in two weeks as a U.S. oil embargo stresses the island’s grid.

properties.titulo_evento: French National Assembly set to adopt assisted dying law in final vote

properties.titulo_evento: Trump threatens strikes on Iran's bridges and power plants

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Alleged Ahmadinejad plot highlights info war

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Kyiv and EU agree on new drone production deal

properties.titulo_evento: India news: Landmark trade deal with UK takes effect

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US launches fresh wave of strikes

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iraq relations: Can Iran-allied militias be disarmed?
